## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress and preview new strategic initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**CVE updates are back on track,** with a new Airtable tab created for SentinelOne to track the status of all new publications.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [**New keyword research is underway** to find fresh topics, avoiding cannibalization of SentinelOne's existing, robust content library.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [**GrowthX is launching a B2B-focused AI visibility platform** to track brand performance in LLMs, which will be included at no extra cost.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**A strategic planning session is set for February** to align on 2026 goals and review content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

## Topics

### CVE Updates

  - [CVE updates are back on schedule, and new posts are indexing healthily.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [A new Airtable tab was created for SentinelOne to track the status of all new CVE publications.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [**Action:** Bailey will share the updated CVE release plan with timelines today.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)

### CS101 Content Strategy

  - [**New Articles:** Four new articles will be delivered this week, incorporating feedback from previous content.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [**Keyword Research:**](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [Goal → Find fresh topics for a longer content runway, moving beyond simply "plugging holes" in the existing library.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [Process → A second manual vetting round is underway to prevent cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [Deliverables → A list of \~25 article recommendations (title, overview, keyword) and the raw keyword list for SentinelOne's review.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)

### Strategic Planning & Reporting

  - [**February Strategic Session:** A dedicated meeting is planned to align on 2026 goals and review content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [**Purpose:** To inform strategic shifts in content direction and structure.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will share a detailed agenda \~1 week prior.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [**Monthly Report:** The late monthly performance report will be sent tomorrow (Jan 15) for async review.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)

### AI Visibility Platform Preview

  - [GrowthX is launching a new AI visibility platform to track B2B brand performance in LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Key Differentiator:** The platform is built on B2B buying categories and pre-loaded with strategic prompts, offering deeper insights than generic tools.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [**Status:** Included at no extra cost. A demo is planned for the next meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
      - [Share updated CVE release plan with timelines (Jan 14).](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
      - [Share keyword research deliverables (recommendations & raw list) (Jan 15).](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
      - [Send monthly performance report (Jan 15).](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [Schedule February strategic session and share agenda \~1 week prior.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [Demo AI visibility platform at the next meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/SciyrxsKpdHwnExC6fXAU6MNubBSDEMN?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
